fail.allowed_action_policy: retain accepted full r5, keep RB-3 open, preserve the frozen predecessor family, and correct only bounded successor projection, stripping, family assembly, or qualification defects; user-built wheel repair remains out of scope and 16 KiB remains a hard gate

input_routing.fallback: retain the accepted successor technical family and frozen predecessor family; return one complete fail-closed receipt; correct only bounded legal-payload acquisition, component rebinding, lineage, reproducibility, verification, audit, or result-index defects; do not infer owner approval, rebind RB-2, supersede the predecessor, close RB-3, or authorize selectability/publication
input_routing.first_attempt: verify the exact accepted successor technical-family authority, lock, result evidence, and frozen RB-1 legal integration/overlay authorities; acquire the exact accepted 23-file family and legal payload; revalidate component bindings against successor manifests; assemble the successor legal family twice; compare every byte; independently verify release metadata, lineage, notice, LICENSE, component map, pip vendored review, technical obligations, one owner-approval gap, and predecessor invariance
